debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝¹ : Fact (p < 2 ^ 254)
inst✝ : Fact (p > 2 ^ 253)
c : ℕ
⊢ ∀ (offset : ℕ) (env : Environment (F p)) (input_var : Var (fields 254) (F p)),
    (∀ (i : Fin 127),
          env.get (offset + ↑i) =
            Expression.eval env
              (Vector.ofFn fun i =>
                  if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                    -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
                  else
                    if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
                      Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                    else
                      if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                      else
                        -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i))[↑i]) ∧
        env.get (offset + 127) = Expression.eval env (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }).sum ∧
          (ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 →
              ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 ∧
                Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange 135 fun i => var { index := offset + 127 + 1 + i }) =
                  fieldToBits 135 (env.get (offset + 127))) ∧
            env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 135) = env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 127) →
      ∀ (input : fields 254 (F p)),
        Vector.map (Expression.eval env) input_var = input →
          (∀ (i : ℕ) (x : i < 254), input[i] = 0 ∨ input[i] = 1) →
            Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }) =
                Vector.map (Expression.eval env)
                  (Vector.ofFn fun i =>
                    if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                      -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2]
                    else
                      if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 0 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 1) = true then
                        Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                                Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] -
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                      else
                        if (c >>> (↑i * 2 + 1) &&& 1 == 1 && c >>> (↑i * 2) &&& 1 == 0) = true then
                          Expression.const ↑(2 ^ 128 - 2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] -
                              Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)
                        else
                          -Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i) * input_var[↑i * 2 + 1] * input_var[↑i * 2] +
                            Expression.const ↑(2 ^ ↑i)) ∧
              env.get (offset + 127) =
                  Expression.eval env (Vector.mapRange 127 fun i => var { index := offset + i }).sum ∧
                ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 ∧
                  env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 135) = env.get (offset + 127 + 1 + 127)

failed_attempts:
intros; and_intros <;> try assumption
    ext i; simp [*, Vector.get_mapRange, Vector.get_ofFn]; split_ifs <;> (simp [*]; rfl)
intros; exists_env; solve_constraints
sorry

intros offset env input_var h_env input h_in_map h_assump
    rcases h_env with ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num2bits, h_out⟩
    and_intros <;> try (first | assumption | apply Vector.ext; intros; simp [h_parts, h_sout, h_out]; rfl)
    sorry
intros; and_intros <;> intros <;> try (first | rfl | assumption | and_intros <;> assumption)

intros offset env input_var h_env input h_input h_bits
    rcases h_env with ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num2bits, h_out⟩
    repeat (and_intros <;> try (ext i; specialize h_parts i; simp [h_input] at h_parts; simp [h_parts, h_input]))
    · exact h_sout
    · have hp : p > 2^135 := by linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim]
      have : ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 := by
        rw [h_sout]; simp only [Expression.eval, Vector.mapRange, Var.index];
        have h_parts_range (i : Fin 127) : ZMod.val (env.get (offset + i)) < 2^128 := by
          specialize h_parts i; simp [h_input] at h_parts; rw [h_parts]
          split_ifs <;> (specialize h_bits (i*2); specialize h_bits (i*2+1);
          rcases h_bits (by linarith) with rfl | rfl <;> rcases h_bits (by linarith) with rfl | rfl <;>
          simp [ZMod.val] <;> try norm_num <;> try (apply Nat.lt_trans (by norm_num); apply Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by norm_num) (by linarith)))
        sorry
      exact this
    · exact h_out
sorry
and_intros <;> ac_rfl

intros offset env input_var h_vars input h_input h_assum
    rcases h_vars with ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num2bits, h_out⟩
    repeat' (and_intro)
    · intro i; simp [h_parts i, h_input]
    · exact h_sout
    · rw [h_sout]
      have h_parts_range (i : Fin 127) : (ZMod.val (env.get (offset + i)) : ℤ) < 2^128 := by
        rw [h_parts i]; specialize h_assum (i.val * 2) (by linarith [i.is_lt]); specialize h_assum (i.val * 2 + 1) (by linarith [i.is_lt])
        rcases h_assum with rfl | rfl <;> rcases h_assum_1 with rfl | rfl <;> (simp [h_input, a_val, b_val]; split_ifs <;> (simp; linarith [ZMod.val_lt (2^i.val : F p), ZMod.val_lt (2^128 - 2^i.val : F p)]))
      sorry
    · exact h_out

intros offset env input_var h_env input h_vars h_input
    and_intros
    · apply Vector.ext; intro i; simp [h_env.1, ← h_vars, *]
    · exact h_env.2.1
    · rw [h_env.2.1]; simp only [Expression.eval, Vector.mapRange, Environment.get, var]
      rw [ZMod.val_sum, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by linarith [‹Fact (p > 2^253)›.elim])]
      apply (Finset.sum_le_sum (λ i _ => ?_)).trans_lt (by norm_num)
      specialize h_env.1 i; simp [Expression.eval, Environment.get, ← h_vars] at *
      specialize h_input (2*i) (by linarith); specialize h_input (2*i+1) (by linarith)
      split_ifs <;> cases h_input <;> (try cases ‹_ ∨ _›) <;> (simp [*]; linarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : (2:ℤ)>0) i.val])
    · exact h_env.2.2.2

intros offset env input_var h_parts h_sout h_num2bits h_out input h_input h_assum
    split_ands
    · ext i; simp only [Vector.get_map, Vector.get_mapRange, Vector.ofFn_get, h_parts]
    · simp only [h_sout, Vector.mapRange]; rfl
    · have h_sout_val : ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2 ^ 135 := by sorry
      exact ⟨h_sout_val, (h_num2bits h_sout_val).right⟩
    · assumption

intros; repeat' constructor <;> try assumption
    · apply Vector.ext; intro i; simp [*]
    · sorry
intros; and_intros <;> try assumption

intro input h_assum
    repeat' (refine ⟨?, ?⟩ <;> try (rfl | simp [h_assum]))
    and_intros <;> try rfl
    sorry

intros offset env input_var h_env input h_input h_bits
    rcases h_env with ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num2bits, h_out⟩
    and_intros
    · apply Vector.ext; intro i; simp [h_parts, Vector.get_mapRange]
    · assumption
    · and_intros
      · sorry
      · assumption

intro offset env input_var h_env input h_iv_eq h_bits
    obtain ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num2bits, h_out⟩ := h_env
    repeat' constructor
    · ext i; specialize h_parts i; simp [h_parts, h_iv_eq]
    · simp [h_sout]
    · have h_sout_val : ZMod.val (env.get (offset + 127)) < 2^135 := by sorry
      exact ⟨h_sout_val, (h_num2bits h_sout_val).right⟩
    · exact h_out
intros; exists_witness; and_intros <;> (simp [*] <;> try ac_rfl)

intros; and_intros <;> (simp only [circuit_norm, main, Num2Bits.circuit] at *; try assumption; try (ext; assumption); try rfl)
    sorry
intros; exists_witness; and_intros <;> (first | rfl | assumption | split_ifs <;> rfl)

intros offset env input_var h_constraints input h_input h_bits
    rcases h_constraints with ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_num, h_out⟩
    refine ⟨by ext i; simp [h_parts, h_input], h_sout, ?_, h_out⟩
    sorry
and_intros <;> ac_rfl

intros offset env input_var h_env input h_map h_assm
    obtain ⟨h_parts, h_sout, h_bits, h_out⟩ := h_env
    and_intros
    · funext i; simp [h_parts, h_map]
    · simp [h_sout, h_parts, h_map, Vector.map_sum, Vector.map_mapRange, Vector.ofFn_get, Vector.map_get, Expression.eval]
    · sorry
    · exact h_out
sorry
circuit_completeness

and_intros <;> intros <;> try assumption
    · ext i; simp [*]

intros input h_input
    refine ⟨_, _, fieldToBits 135 _, ?_⟩
    simp [Assumptions] at h_input
    repeat' (any_goals constructor; try (intros; simp; rfl))
    · sorry
    · sorry
and_intros <;> ac_rfl

intros; repeat' constructor <;> try assumption
    · simp_all [Vector.mapRange, Vector.map_ofFn]
    · sorry
intros; vintro <;> circuit_solve

intros offset env input_var h_cons input h_in_val h_in_bits
    and_intros <;> (simp [*, Vector.ext_iff] at *; try assumption)
    sorry
intros; exists_env; circuit_completeness

intros; repeat (refine ⟨_, ?_⟩ <;> try (and_intros <;> try rfl))
    · intros; rfl
    · rfl
    · apply Num2Bits.completeness; sorry
    · rfl
